film.title: Shakti: The Power
film.overview: A couple visits the husband's family in India and finds itself in the middle of a fratricidal battle.

dialogues.dialogue: What sort of a man are you to giVe explosiVes to a child? The skies haVen't fallen if we blew up a bomb You ought to be ashamed! If the bomb had gone off in his hands...he could haVe lost a limb... anything could haVe happened This child is no bomb you can replace with another What madam...? Do you eat fodder to act like an animal?

You and I too. But as long as we liVe, we must lead a proud life Now look... - Look at what? You're a shameless woman! There was your husband, lying dead...and you were all set to leaVe. - GiVe my son to me! He stays here. You may stay here too, if you wish to But listen carefully. Don't you eVer mess with me again. Do you understand?
dialogues.cause_raw: leaving her husband's house after his death

dialogues.dialogue: What sort of a man are you to give explosives to a child? The skies haven't fallen if we blew up a bomb You ought to be ashamed! If the bomb had gone off in his hands...he could have lost a limb... anything could have happened This child is no bomb you can replace with another What madam...? Do you eat fodder to act like an animal?

You and I too. But as long as we live, we must lead a proud life Now look... - Look at what? You're a shameless woman! There was your husband, lying dead...and you were all set to leave. - Give my son to me! He stays here. You may stay here too, if you wish to But listen carefully. Don't you ever mess with me again. Do you understand?

You and I dance... we sway Under the gleaming swords...the anklets chime The drum-beat...''This soil we loVe... we are proud of it'' We're the stirring winds that will uproot the enemy We stand like the tall mountains

The three of us. Let's go, please! - But what is the matter? What is the matter? He was teaching Raja to burst a grenade You're proud of him, aren't you? But he's a beast! A wild animal! He applies the holy mark on his forehead, he cuts up a goat...and he turns your sister into a widow! He broke her bangles and he sent that man's head rolling...He's a killer. A bloody killer!

Do you understand? That husband of yours in the picture...he was a fox born to a tiger! He went away to a foreign land...and forget his manliness in your cosmetic beauty And now he's dead. But eVeryone has to die You and I too. But as long as we liVe, we must lead a proud life Now look... - Look at what? You're a shameless woman! There was your husband, lying dead...and you were all set to leaVe. - GiVe my son to me!

You and I dance... we sway Under the gleaming swords...the anklets chime The drum-beat..."This soil we love... we are proud of it" We're the stirring winds that will uproot the enemy We stand like the tall mountains

The three of us. Let's go, please! - But what is the matter? What is the matter? He was teaching Raja to burst a grenade You're proud of him, aren't you? But he's a beast! A wild animal! He applies the holy mark on his forehead, he cuts up a goat...and he turns your sister into a widow! He broke her bangles and he sent that man's head rolling...He's a killer. A bloody killer!

Do you understand? That husband of yours in the picture...he was a fox born to a tiger! He went away to a foreign land...and forget his manliness in your cosmetic beauty And now he's dead. But everyone has to die You and I too. But as long as we live, we must lead a proud life Now look... - Look at what? You're a shameless woman! There was your husband, lying dead...and you were all set to leave. - Give my son to me!
